createPolicy: await vajra.createPolicy({ policyId, delegatedSigner, allowedMint, totalBudget, perTxCap, expirySlot, periodBudget, periodDurationSlots, minSlotInterval });
simulateSpend: await vajra.simulateSpend({ policy, mint, destinationTokenAccount, amount });
executeSpend: await agentClient.spend({ policy, mint, destinationTokenAccount, amount });
